overview.minides: More space, more capability, more tech — the Thar Roxx brings the legendary Thar experience into a practical 5-door family SUV.
overview.description: The Mahindra Thar Roxx launched in September 2024 as the 5-door variant of the iconic Thar, built on the same body-on-frame M-Glyde platform as the Scorpio-N. It features Penta-Link + Watts Link suspension with Frequency Dependent Damping, 2.0L turbo-petrol and 2.2L mHawk diesel engines in RWD and 4WD configs, 6 trims (MX1, MX3, MX5, AX3L, AX5L, AX7L) and 21 variants. Top AX trims get Level 2 ADAS, Adrenox connected tech, Harman Kardon 9-speaker audio, 360-degree camera, panoramic sunroof, and 19-inch dual-tone alloys.

suspension.rear: Watts Link with Frequency Dependent Damping (M-Glyde platform)
suspension.additionalTech: M-Glyde Platform — Penta Link + Watts Link with FDD

brakes.rear: Drum (MX1, MX3 MT) / Disc (MX3 AT and above)
